column6: Note
Wanted to know if BPOMS was compatible with video otoscopy. I thought no, but this website is saying their otoscope is compatible. Creating ticket and investigating.
Called for week 1, left a message.
Calling back about line 2, just had a bunch of little questions about how to get an image to display in audiology.  Sounds like he doesn't know how to save an image from the otoscope yet
Help creating a TNS campaign
help locating and deleting an insurer payment

50138 error. Server connection test was successful, synced date and time, and restarted the computer.

Forgot to check the version number: they were on version 4.15, but their server was 4.16.
Wondering if there was a way to see how many hearing tests they gave in a month, showed her how to filter appiontment analysis report
Had some questions on merge field
Assistance uploading a form. Original template was a word document but they changed it to PDF.
Requested an integration on their new company file.
How to merge patients, shared UG page and walked her through it

Called him to get connected to Noah Server. BPLink hadn't started. Starting BPLink fixed the issue.

Had some questions about CPT codes. Told him he'd need to update them in Setup, and showed him the updated superbill.
Lydia asked for asistance installing Blueprint, Thye have had troubles in the past.
Wondering how to get default signatures enabled, she had acrobat pro so I showed her how to convert the .doc to pdf and make her life easier

Needed some chargers moved from their hearing aids catalog to orderable items. I was able to do this for them in the db. set is_hearing_aid = false for any signia items in orderable items that had "charger" or "Charger" in the model name
Didn't enter
Has been using chargers categorized as HAs which is messing up reporting.  Wanted to know the best category for chargers moving forward. Suggested orderable items.
Creating a template and patient list for an insurance campaign.

PT didn't realise they had a hearing benefit, needed to unapply payment and then create a claim to take 3p payment, she fought me on it a bunch because she was worried that it would mess their accounting up for the year?
Unable to book some appts online.  Booking timeslot interval may be set too low.  They didnt have user privilege to edit so they will talk to an owner and see about adjusting it.
was trying to register clinic number but didn't have the option to. I let her know UK clinic's need to provision new numbers.
Nimet was attempting to login with the wrong username.
Calling because they had a meeting with Henrik at 9, he called 20 second into our phone call.
Had some questions about how to view the calendar best

Clinic is unable to receive images from patients. Confirmed that this is true in testing (Next Release) as well. Was unable to find a JIRA for this and will create a ticket when I learn more from Tashia and L4.

has a cc payment that she needs to get rid of because it was made as an over payment, but the customer ended up paying with a check instead. Wants to know what to do with the cc payment, but is afraid of deleting it because she doens't know if it was voided or returned through the payarc terminal and not BP. She is going to confirm with Ken Handy to see what really happened - if it was returned or voided. Then get back to me.
Audio help continues their battle with 3p AR, just had a couple reports questions about where to find unapplied credits etc
Needed help unlinking HAs from managed care so we could adjust the pricing and apply a payment
Installing BP on a new computer.
needed help finding a 3rd party payment that she needed to delete
Very inconsistent internet and the screenconnect was dropping every few seconds, getting errors when trying to open BP, advise to ask IT
Getting error when connecting to Noah cloud
VA_vei (cancelled in 2022) received an email from us telling them that their cc on file has expired. Transferred to accounting to make sure that they weren't still being charged and to clear this up.

Had an interesting visual bug on the schedule, declined to have a ticket made as this has never happened before and was not effecting functionality.  Booked a patient for Sunday the 4th, then changed the date to the 5th at 8 am.  She then changed the time and the tentative question mark icon remained at the top of the schedule on the 5th.  Only for the provider the patient was scheduled with and the icon was effected by status filters and the 'show/hide' status icons button
I forgot to ask where she was calling from. She wanted to know how to create new events and also how to edit/create custom forms
BP installed with the 64x launch link on the regular launcher file. Reinstalled.
Wanted to know where to find patient forms vs order forms
iCal stopped working, needed instructions and a little guidance to get it back up and running
Had some questions on scheduling a noah upgrade.  Advised them to reply to the ticket they have open with Gabe.
Needed help with write offs
Need a code edited on one of their custom superbills. Advised them to submit a support ticket.
Recently had a front office staff quit so they're having to relearn everything, needed to know how to take a deposit, print purchase agreement, edit L&D and warr
How to create an invoice for ear molds
Additional help creating an invoice for hearing aids with an earmold.
Help with sending HA for repair
Saying that their online forms are not sending out, made ticket to investigate
LL request

has a custy from the UK, so they want to be able to select that country when creating patients and 3rd parties.
summary was off for 3rd party totals. Helped her figure out why
Accidentally took a payment for the wrong Pt.  Showed her how to transfer a payment to a diff pt
Was having trouble processing and saving a form.  Helped her download the form and save it to patients file
Wasn't able to reallocate cost for a managed care insurer....  Explained what the managed care option does
Needed help deleting a payment from a patients sales history for a payment that bounced

had questions about using another program or if bp does accounting. He doesn't like qbo

also has an open ticket regarding certain patients being marked as inactive in bp, but failing to sync to qbo due to a message of an oustanding balance.
Wanted some info on how sig pads work.
Help editing events and availability
Had an issue with skipped messages, couldnt remember the transactions.  Forgot she was doing training and they were under her name
wants to make the switch to qbo and had some questions on what it takes.
Wondering how to clean up inventory, went over inventory report and how to edit inventory items
Reopening a closed claim.

was getting a 309 error message when trying to log in. Got that fixed. They also needed help installing Noah 4.117 on another computer but it had no space left in the hard drive. I helped clean it up but then lost connection.
Editing an audiogram on a patients file and saving (required field hadn't been set).
she created a write off from the patient side not insurer so it was showing that on invoice and she didn't know how to fix it.
reinstall
Needed help prepating a HCFA
Regenerate invoice, edit invoice
Very confused about block scheduling and OAB, they were still on availability and trying to set blocks for online booking, while still using availability
How to merge patient files
Wondering how to properly merge patients
Needed help applying a discount

Patients that owe a small balance, how to flag them as having an unpaid balance. Suggested either the patient note or the 'Cash sales only' checkbox.

Question about A/R Aging Detail Report and clearing out patient balances with returns.

Reporting that he couldn't connect to the cloud server, but he's the only one having issues. Tried the classic troubleshooting steps and no dice. Katelyn was also able to connect to the server on our end with no issue. We tinkered for about an hour and couldn't figure this one out. He mentioned that about a month ago they did some big changes to their network/firewall, so it's likely this computer is just missing some settings/whitelisting that the others got. Sending a recap so he can pass along to his IT.
BP freezing whenever they attempt to fax one of their documents. Confirmed that it's an issue with the template. Will do some testing from my end and create a ticket.
I heard a little bit of a voice and then they hang up immediately
Looking for a way to print demographic information for patients with specific data not is different than what prints on the summary page.
completed Noah integration, was difficult getting admin access from IT
How to enter bulk insurer payment
Called to check in. Both Curt and Jacqueline were busy. Followed up in ticket.
New user unable to view provider calendars/colors. Unable to get connected to investigate, but clinic will call us back in 30 when they can get on the device.
Help installing bp on new computer
Needs assistance with a customer audiogram form. Will send us what they are hoping to use
Called to check in and followup with ticket. Going to try to find some time to train other members of the clinic.
Issue with order, trying to add 3rd party allocation. It was set up with Claims Tracking, but he wasn't familiar with it. Talked him through some of the basics and he's going to try it out.
Unable to communicate with launch link, said they checked their internet, wasn't able to access bphelp because their internet is down
color by appt type
How to edit and send a manual marketing email
Wondering about appointment reminders, explained that they are bundled with SMS
Changing the noah file associated with the corresponding patient file in BP. Server computer wasn't available but they will cb as soon as it is.
Calling for Logan. Transferred.
Calling for Zach A. who was unavailable. Shooting him a message to let him know Kabir requested to speak with him before eod.
Wanted help with a manual marketing campaign. She had added the template and pulled the patient list, and just needed an assist on how to actually send it. Bada-boom.
Calling for Logan.
Insurance changed the amount they paid, walked him though adjusting the payments and writeoffs
Had a claim that was submitted through CT for both insurers, but one had an allocation. Needed to close the claim and re-prepare the HCFA so that the allocated insurer was not checked on the HCFA.

Having an issue with a credit/refund.  Patients account seems to be balanced but there is a return credit that doesnt have a payment to apply to .  karen will talk to her accountant and get to us if needed.
Truhearing transactions not appearing on the "3rd party payer Transactions" Report for some reason. Directed them to the Managed care report instead.
Needed to re-check color by event type
Help editing user privileges. Mainly wanted to give someone the ability to recieve with bill/enter manf. bill
Needed help compiling a list of everyone referred by a profider
sales history user error correction- wrong amount was refunded
Turns out you cannot update a form with a pdf if it was originially uploaded as a .doc, also had some questions about NIHB/backend forms
Help installing BP on new laptop
Wants a way to search for invoices based on a different reference number. Helped show her how to add a note to the invoice to be searched through via the Sales by Income Account report.

Trying to "batch out his settlements" which is something to do with the payarc terminal apparently?? Something that prints out of the terminal I guess??? He called payarc and he said call us. I gave him Ken Handy's number - said we can help him print reports out of BP but that's about it.
Had a repair that was cancelled and needed to be re-run. Told her she needed to re-deliver the aids first before trying the repair again (they were in "repair cancelled" status).
Help returning aids to stock

can't run the kpi analysis report. Said that he had entered all the required fields correctly, but no data was showing on the report. I was able to run it from my end and it worked. We also had trouble connecting through Screen connect, so I'm having him restart his computer. It wasn't the computer. The report craps out if there is no data to show. Running the report for December works, but not for January 2026. I ran the report to XLS and nothing came out. I told him that if there is data, we'll need to report to our techs. He said he was going to check with his team and get back to us. They told him they made a sale in January. -\0/-
Getting an error when trying to upload docs for interactive sms setup.  Reached VM
Needed help straigtening out three separate patient billing issues between their insurers and private payments, also is having an issue with the 3rd party payers report
payment amount was entered incorrectly- helped her edit payment, create write off
Wanted help setting up availability. Set it up for last year, and needed a refresher on how to get it rolling for 2026.
3rd party payer was set for Claims Tracking, so 3rd party pricing wasn't showing up when creating a sale. Helped her find the setting and adjust it.
This is the third time I've had to explain to Brian that you need to deliver devices in order for there to be an invoice, and therefor a sales history line item
Needed help applying return credit from 3p ledger
Wondering why WCB forms are greyed out for patients who have WCB on file
how to do a return and refund 3rd party payment
patients are getting multiple AR's for appointment times they are not booked at.

Taha was in meeting, noted ticket
See ticket
Wondering how best to implement a new event type into OAB

Error when generating HCFAs

add text snippet category for sms

needed help going through the Setup menu

Applying a 3rd party return credit.

The reauthenticate window popped up but was all white and locker her BP up, ended the task and restarted, told her to call back if that happens again
Attempting to export a patient to noah. Wrong location was selected in Blueprint.
Wondering about how to create a new resource
Wanted to know if there was a way to add a precentage credit card fee automatically
Got a call that one of their clinics is having issues with Noah. Called the clinic and was told it was another location.  Called that location and got a VM.  Will try back
How to filter sales report to hide insurer transactions (scroll down on the parameters dialog and select show patient txns only)
The bottom portion of the patient journal was snapped all the way to the bottom
Issue with a recurring event that needs to get removed

Wanted some sort of additional layer added to scheduling below both events and availability- advised she would need to submit an enhancement request- this is a training issue- their staff are moving appointment blocks when they shouldn't be.
had an outstanding balance from a return that needed to be applied to original invoice.

said BP kept freezing up. Checked servers and launched it from my end. Nothing out of the ordinary. As we were talking her boss mentioned that it was the internet. They are going to look into that and call back if they need anymore help.
Setting up their new server computer.
wrong blueprint
Went over how to download/upload custom forms. Where order-related forms are generated. How to submit tickets for custom form requests, she is going to send in a ticket that I will grab
Calling for Scott
Wanted help understanding options for an adjustment to his invoice template. Walked him through the options, and helped him figure out user signatures
Wondering why ear plugs were showing on pt's summary, they were in the system as HA

They are having an issue where patients are not exporting to Noah.  It seems that lots of their patients come in to multiple locations and they want to keep their home location set to the other clinic which is preventing the export to Noah.
Couldn't access patient file, but the issue seems to have resolved itself. Told her to call back if the issue pops up again.
Had some further questions about the same ticket from the previous call. Helped him walk through the same thing with a quote template.

^See above

Wanted to get in touch with someone about closing or downgrading their acct

Looking for cancelled and no-show appointment report. Pointed her toward the cancelled and no show appointments report. Breezy.
looks like i'm the uk guy today. Needed help installing Noah on a new computer
Called with questions about how to use the purchase agreement I had added to their system. Walked them through how, and made a quick edit to fix a formatting issue.

- Wants the color setting on availability. Made 264405
- 3 forms need little adjustments. Made 264407

Users on a specific computer were unable to click on patient tabs. They could click on anything else, just not patient tabs. We tried another user on the same computer and same result. I could click tabs from the screenconnect with no issue. Tried uninstalling a Windows update, tried Java version - also no luck. I enabled the console and saw no errors. It ended up being the mouse.
How to find a journal entry she made yesterday if she doesn't know the patient. Directed her to the journal entries report.

Asking how to cancel an order. She said she removed one item already but just wants to cancel the whole thing? She said nothing was received, but the cancel order option was greyed out. I was asking a follow up question when she said she'd have to call us back.
Wanting to follow up on creating a new system. Created ticket for Jenna.
Payment wasn't showing on sales report, the payment's location was incorrect and they were filtering the sales report for one location
needs an insurer status changed from private to public

While she was explaining the issue she realized she figured it out
was having trouble adjusting a sale so she could refund some money back to a patient, but had figured it out while we were on the phone.

Help installing bp on mac, needed to install java, and allow thru privacy/security
Question about the Sales Opportunity report and what a qualifying appointment is. Helped talk him through it, and update his Noah puretone settings.

Was hoping we could change a payment for her as she doesnt have privilege to do so.  I let her know that I could tell her how but could not make that change.  She will reach out to an owner or admin for assistance
Needed their launch link + install instructions.  Also had a wack QBO issue.  Ticketed both
needed help recreating oab schedule using block scheduling

wanted to know how to access in clinic monitor

Visa payments not showing up on 'enter bank deposit' tab. In Setup>Payment options, Visa was not set to undeposited funds. They have a new 3rd party accountant, so they're going to check with them to see if the accountant made the change.

Ruth from Resound called on behalf of Jill.  Ruth is working up upgrading their server computer and got a message she is not used to seeing when migrating their data.  The message went away so she will continue on as planned but may need assistance after with a reintegration.  I created a ticket for them in case they need furher assistance.

wanted to know how electronic claim submission works.

She knows Blueprint well cause when I said 'go here' she knew what I was talking about.

called cause Noah hasn't been able to send patient audios to BP. I connected and it was working. They said that some days it works, other days it doesn't. Not sure why. They are running 4.14, maybe that's why. I suggested it could be an internet issue (they are in Manitoba - it gets very cold up there) or it could be the version. will update ticket

Seemed to have a spotty internet connection before connecting; 'can't communicate with LL' and couldn't access websites. Did get connected and was able to log in when I did so. Encouraged her to check network and try restarting if it happens again.

wanted to know if there was an update to a custom template BP support had created for them. I let her know she could edit it herself or send in a ticket so we can update it. She said she wwas going to search online for an updated form.
